action.reasoning: Observation: Best test acc 78.47% from iter 4. Recent experiments haven't improved. Analysis: Overcomplicating things. Need to go back to what worked (iter 4 approach) and make targeted improvements. Key: short Phase 2, SCE loss, moderate mixup, and now add sample weighting from cleanlab scores. Decision: Rewrite train.py cleanly based on iter 4 success, add cleanlab-based sample weighting, stronger augmentation, and submit eval.
